title: Horizontal Manual Scaling for a Deployment — Scaling down a Deployment
text:
To reduce the number of Pods, set
--replicas
to a lower value:
kubectl scale deployment/nginx-deployment --replicas
=
2
Kubernetes gracefully terminates the excess Pods, respecting each Pod's
terminationGracePeriodSeconds
setting.
Verify that the Deployment has two Pods:
kubectl get pods -l
app
=
nginx
The output is similar to:
NAME                                READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
nginx-deployment-66b6c48dd5-7gl6h   1/1     Running   0          2m
nginx-deployment-66b6c48dd5-v8mkd   1/1     Running   0          2m
